name: Abdullah Saeed Khodari
title: Full Stack Developer
summary: Passionate and detail-oriented Full Stack Developer with strong experience building scalable web and mobile applications using React.js, Next.js, React Native (Expo), Node.js, Express, NestJS, and MongoDB. I focus on clean, maintainable code and fast user experiences, and enjoy working on collaborative teams to deliver impactful solutions.

experience.brief: Developed backend architecture for a voice AI platform, integrating Soniox STT, Dograh conversational workflows, and Anthropic Batch APIs for automated call summarization.
Developing scalable full-stack web applications, designing optimized database schemas, and integrating multi-provider payment and notification systems.
Full-stack development of a game-based learning platform, handling Node.js backends, React Native mobile apps, and Next.js web interfaces.

projects.name: Voice AI Agent Platform | Olimi AI
bullets: Integrated advanced Text-to-Speech (TTS) and Speech-to-Text (STT) servers, implementing the Soniox STT API to handle low-latency transcription for voice agents.
Engineered an automated data pipeline using the Anthropic Batch API to process and generate accurate summaries from large volumes of call transcriptions.
Configured and deployed Dograh, an open-source voice AI conversation builder, to manage telephony integrations and orchestrate complex AI caller workflows.
Developed and maintained core backend services, implementing robust CRUD operations for user configuration, call routing, and system data management.

projects.name: Loyalla - Multi-Tenant SaaS Platform | OrderKing Egypt
bullets: Architected a scalable 4-tier multi-tenant SaaS architecture (Agencies > Tenants > Branches > Consumers) using Node.js, Express, and Drizzle ORM.
Engineered a resilient billing engine integrating Stripe and Fawry for automated subscription mirroring, multi-currency billing, localized tax compliance (VAT), and automated PDF/QR invoicing.
Orchestrated asynchronous marketing campaigns and system maintenance using a distributed pg-boss task system, and implemented security via Supabase Vault and a GDPR data portability engine.
Built an administrative dashboard using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS with full internationalization (LTR/RTL) and advanced analytics via Chart.js and React-Leaflet.
Designed an interactive developer portal featuring automated API documentation and environment-aware code samples for third-party POS integrations.

projects.name: Enterprise ERP & POS Platform | OrderKing Egypt
bullets: Designed and optimized a cross-country B2B ERP and POS platform powered by Node.js, Express, and MySQL, featuring a proprietary Product Stock Location (PSL) logistics engine using CRON jobs and WebSockets.

Automated physical warehouse workflows with generated scannable asset labels, and developed the secure infrastructure powering 'QuickPlate' self-ordering tablets including SaaS subscriptions and heartbeat monitoring.
Engineered multi-channel CRM ticketing with real-time chat and RMA handling, and pushed emergency support tickets to field agents via direct APNs and Firebase Admin FCM.
Implemented a comprehensive financial suite tracking fiscal periods and multi-currency mappings, alongside token-authenticated digital asset viewing and e-signature capabilities.
Configured robust authentication layers with strictly protected routing to separate user journeys for internal admin agents and external B2B clients.

projects.name: WingoLand - Game-Based Learning Platform | WingoLand
bullets: Spearheaded the full-stack development of a game-based learning platform for teaching English, featuring interactive levels and progress tracking.
Built the main web application using Next.js and Tailwind CSS, optimizing for performance and responsive design.
Developed and published a cross-platform mobile application using React Native (Expo), successfully deploying to Google Play and the Apple App Store.
Engineered the backend architecture using Node.js, Express, and MongoDB to manage dynamic game data and user state.
Implemented complex monetization flows including Apple In-App Purchases, Tap payments gateway, and Tabby split payments.
Managed static asset delivery and optimization via AWS S3 to ensure fast load times across global regions.

projects.name: Home Service Booking App
bullets: Developed the frontend for a home service booking mobile application using React Native (Expo) and Tailwind CSS.
Translated complex Figma designs into high-quality, pixel-perfect, and responsive UI components.
Integrated service booking flows, user profiles, and real-time status updates via RESTful APIs.

projects.name: QR Generator Authentication System
bullets: Full-stack authentication system with QR code management using Node.js, Express, and React Native
JWT-based authentication with 10-minute token expiration for enhanced security
Password reset functionality with Nodemailer integration for email notifications
MongoDB database with Prisma ORM for efficient data management
React Native mobile app with Expo for cross-platform QR code generation
Input validation using Zod schema validation library
Secure password hashing with bcrypt and real-time features with Socket.io

projects.name: Trego
bullets: A modern and fully-featured eCommerce web application built with Next.js, TypeScript, shadcn, and lucide.
Bilingual interface (Arabic and English) with a fully responsive design across all devices.
Store system: product listings with high-quality images, advanced multilingual search, smart shopping cart with quantity management, and detailed product pages.
Integrated payment system: supports Kashier gateway, secure credit card payments, and cash-on-delivery option.
Advanced order management: real-time order tracking, automatic notifications, and inventory management.
Admin dashboard: manage products and categories, approve and control listings, track orders, and update order statuses.

projects.name: Kafka Event Handler – Node.js Microservice
bullets: Microservice handling real-time event streaming with Apache Kafka.
Implemented producers/consumers.
Built with Node.js, Express.js, Apache Kafka, MongoDB, Docker.

projects.name: RentEase
bullets: Full-stack Web app for property listing and booking; notifications via automated WhatsApp messages.
Admin test credentials: admin / 123456

projects.name: EduBase
bullets: Full-stack Course purchasing platform with admin management.
Built with React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB.
Paymob payment gateway integration.
Admin test credentials: admin@gmail.com / 123456

projects.name: Game-based learning mobile app
bullets: Game-based learning cross-platform mobile app for kids.
The app consists of a landing page in the form of game map of levels each leads to a different game based on the data fetched from the backend.
The content of the game is dynamic and is fetched from the backend then organized depending on the game view.
Built with React Native (Expo), Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB.

projects.name: Quizzz
bullets: Full-stack Quiz app for making, editing, and taking quizzes, and comparing answers with correct ones.
Built with React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB.

projects.name: College registration system
bullets: Full-stack College registration system.
For adding and registering courses, submitting, editing, and showing grades, and more.
Built with React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB.
Admin test credentials: code: 1234 / password: 123456

education.details: Intensive hands-on training focusing on building full-stack applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Angular, and Node.js.
